description: Composition Green capris with florescent green print for women made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, with Dri-Fit technology, a broad elasticated waist and stitch detailing Fit Tight fit Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, dry clean or iron Line dry Stylish to a T, these capris from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
